title: agrostis densiflora var. littoralis
intro: Agrostis densiflora var. littoralis, also known as coastal bent grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is native to coastal areas and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Agrostis densiflora var. littoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
